overall.description: A cinematic third-person view from a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a horse-drawn carriage traveling through golden prairie grasslands under dramatic storm clouds. The carriage approaches and crosses a wooden bridge over a wide river, then pulls to the side to allow an oncoming wagon to pass in a rural 19th-century American frontier setting.

segments.scene_description: The carriage travels along a dirt path through open prairie grasslands under a dramatic overcast sky. The landscape features rolling golden hills with a wide river visible to the right, and a wooden bridge ahead spanning the water.

events.description: carriage transitions from dirt path onto wooden bridge deck
carriage slows and pulls to the right side of the bridge, turning to face the river

agents.ego_description: crossing the wooden bridge then pulling the carriage to the side and turning to face the river valley

entered.detail: wooden railings along the left side of the bridge deck
wooden railings along the right side of the bridge deck
tall solitary tree on the riverbank visible across the bridge

segments.scene_description: The carriage drives onto the wooden bridge, crossing over the river with wooden railings visible on both sides. As the carriage reaches the far side, it slows and pulls to the right, turning to face the river valley. The river shifts from the right to the left side of the frame as the carriage reorients.

events.description: oncoming horse-drawn carriage appears at the far end of the bridge
ego carriage comes to a complete stop to yield to oncoming traffic

agents.ego_description: stopped on the bridge shoulder waiting for the oncoming carriage to pass

notable_agents.action: covered wagon pulled by two horses approaching from the opposite direction on the bridge

entered.detail: covered wagon with two horses approaching from the opposite direction

segments.scene_description: Stopped on the bridge, the carriage waits as an oncoming horse-drawn wagon approaches from the opposite direction. The river flows on the left side while the large tree on the bank moves closer in the frame. The two vehicles prepare to pass each other on the narrow wooden bridge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a journey across open prairie grasslands to a tense encounter on a narrow wooden bridge. It begins with the carriage traveling along a dirt path through rolling golden hills under a dramatic overcast sky, with a wide river flowing to the right. As the carriage advances, it drives onto the wooden bridge and crosses the water before slowing and pulling to the right, causing the river to shift from the right to the left side of the frame. The scene then settles as the carriage comes to a halt, facing the river valley while an oncoming horse-drawn wagon approaches from the opposite direction. Finally, the camera lingers on the two vehicles preparing to pass each other on the bridge as a large tree on the riverbank moves closer into view.
